title: 'Alice for Adults' at library this morning
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Library invites the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George Library invites the community to join its “Alice for Adults” meeting at 11:00 this morning, Wednesday 21 August, in celebration of Women’s Month.


> The monthly “Alice” meetings have been becoming more popular as people discover the wonder in our own world, inspired by the adventures of “Alice in Wonderland”.


Almost everyone has had a brief encounter with "Alice" somewhere in their life journey, even if only in the rabbit hole of the internet.

Today's programme includes the mini-launch of a memoir by a local woman, Sharon Eland-Lewis, whose life is one of continuous struggle to overcome tremendous challenges. The book, written in Afrikaans, not only showcases her literary talent but also highlights her strength as a person living with a disability.

Join the wondrous world of "Alice" at the library, where "Antie Stienie" is also going to be a special guest. All the guests are encouraged to wear hats if they want to...

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
